# AI Bangs Filter Virtual Try-On

## Overview
Try on Your Perfect Hair Bangs with AI
Realistic Looks: Experiment with realistic bangs and discover the style that best complements your face.​
Versatile Styling Options: Explore a wide range of bangs styles to suit every personality and occasion.​
Effortless Experience: Enjoy a user-friendly interface that makes trying new bangs easy and fun​.

Want to see more Hair Bang styles? Please refer to https://yce.makeupar.com/bangs-filter.

Use case:

![AI Hair Bang Generator](https://bcw-media.s3.ap-northeast-1.amazonaws.com/hair_style_v1_video_1200x674px_1_259f619dfd.png "AI Hair Bang Generator")

![AI Hair Bang Generator](https://bcw-media.s3.ap-northeast-1.amazonaws.com/hair_style_v1_video_1200x674px_2_7146754733.png "AI Hair Bang Generator")


Suggestions for How to Shoot:
![Suggestions for How to Shoot](https://bcw-media.s3.ap-northeast-1.amazonaws.com/AI_Hair_Extension_recommendation_ba24bd5d92.png "Suggestions for How to Shoot")

---

### File Specs & Errors

* Supported Formats & Dimensions

|AI Feature|Supported Dimensions|Supported File Size|Supported Formats|
|  ----  | ----  | ----  | ----  |
|AI Hair Bang Generator|long side <= 1024, face width >= 128, face pose: -10 < pitch < +10, -45 < yaw < +45, -15 < roll < +15, single face only, need to show full face|< 10MB|jpg/jpeg/png|

* Error Codes

|Error Code|Description|
|  ----  | ----  |
|error_no_shoulder	|Shoulders are not visible in the source image
|error_large_face_angle	|The face angle in the uploaded image is too large
|error_insufficient_landmarks	|Cannot detect sufficient face or body landmarks in the source image
|error_hair_too_short	|Input hair is too short
|error_face_pose	|The face pose of source image is unsupported
|error_bald_image	|Input hairstyle is bald

## Reference

- **API version:** V1.0
- **OpenAPI version:** 3.0.0
- **Source:** [OpenAPI description](https://docs.perfectcorp.com/_bundle/reference/ai_bangs.yaml)
- **Servers:** `https://yce-api-01.makeupar.com`

## Authentication

| Name | Type | Scheme / Location | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| BearerAuthenticationV2 | http | bearer | Use the standard 'Bearer authentication'. Put your 'API Key' in header: `Authorization:Bearer YOUR_API_KEY`. Notice that there is ' ' a space between 'Bearer' and the 'YOUR_API_KEY'. |

## Endpoints

### `POST` `/s2s/v2.0/file/hair-bang`
**Create a new file.**

To upload a new file, you'll first need to use the File API. It will give you a URL – use that URL to upload your file. Once the upload is finished, you can use the file_id from the same response to start using our AI features.

**Tags:** V1.0

**Authentication:** BearerAuthenticationV2
#### Request body

**application/json** · required

**Schema:** `FileV1.1`

This object represents a file.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `files` | `array<object>` | Yes | — |
| `files.content_type` | `string` | Yes | Content MIME type for this file. Currently available values are listed in the enum. |
| `files.file_name` | `string` | Yes | Name of this file |
| `files.file_size` | `integer` | Yes | Content length for this file in bytes. Should not be larger than 10MB. |

#### Responses

**200** — Successful retrieval of file upload information

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `FileResponseV2`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `status` | `integer` | No | Response status |
| `data` | `BasicFileResponse` | No | — |
| `data.files` | `array<object>` | No | — |
| `data.files.content_type` | `string` | No | Content MIME type for this file. |
| `data.files.file_name` | `string` | No | Name of this file |
| `data.files.file_id` | `string` | No | ID of this file. Other run task API will need this `file_id`. |
| `data.files.requests` | `array<object>` | No | Using upload `url`, `headers`, `method` below to upload file. After completion, the `file_id` is used to proceed with calling run task API. |

**400** — Invalid request parameters

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `object`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `status` | `integer` | No | Response status |
| `error` | `string` | No | Error message |
| `error_code` | `string — InvalidParameters` | No | — |

**401** — Invalid API Key or Inactive API Key or Expired API Key

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `object`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `status` | `integer` | No | Response status |
| `error_code` | `string — InvalidApiKey \| InactiveApiKey \| ExpiredApiKey` | No | — |

### `POST` `/s2s/v2.0/task/hair-bang`
**Run an AI Hair Bang Generator task.**

This endpoint initiates the hair bang generation process using a template and source image. The task will be processed asynchronously, and you can check its status using the task_id returned in this response.

**Tags:** V1.0

**Authentication:** BearerAuthenticationV2
#### Request body

**application/json** · required

**Schema:** `RunWithSingleTemplate & BasicRunTaskV2SrcFileUrl | BasicRunTaskV2SrcFileId`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `template_id` | `string` | Yes | ID of the template. List predefined templates first, and use the id of a template. |
| `src_file_url` | `string` | Yes | Url of the file to run task. The url should be publicly accessible. |
| `src_file_id` | `string` | Yes | ID of file to run task. File ID from upload file API. |

#### Responses

**200** — Successful execution of the task

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `BasicRunTaskResponseV2`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `status` | `integer` | No | Response status |
| `data` | `object` | No | — |
| `data.task_id` | `string` | No | ID of this task. Task result is valid to query by this ID for 24 hours. |

**400** — Failed execution of task

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `RunError`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `status` | `integer` | No | Response status |
| `error` | `string` | No | Error message |
| `error_code` | `string — CreditInsufficiency \| InvalidStyleGroup \| InvalidStyle \| BadRequest \| InvalidParameters` | No | — |

**401** — Invalid API Key or Inactive API Key or Expired API Key

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `object`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `status` | `integer` | No | Response status |
| `error_code` | `string — InvalidApiKey \| InactiveApiKey \| ExpiredApiKey` | No | — |

**429** — Too many requests within a given amount of time

### `GET` `/s2s/v2.0/task/hair-bang/{task_id}`
**Check the status of a AI Hair Bang Generator task.**

**Tags:** V1.0

**Authentication:** BearerAuthenticationV2
#### Parameters

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `task_id` | path | `string` | Yes | ID of task to check |

#### Responses

**200** — Successful check of the task status

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `TaskStatusResponseV2`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `status` | `integer` | No | Response status |
| `data` | `object` | No | — |
| `data.task_status` | `string — running \| success \| error` | No | Status of this task |
| `data.error` | `EngineErrorCode — exceed_max_filesize \| invalid_parameter \| error_download_image \| error_decode_image \| error_nsfw_content_detected \| error_inference \| unknown_internal_error \| null` | No | Errors: - `exceed_max_filesize` - Input file size exceeds the maximum limit - `invalid_parameter` - Invalid parameter value - `error_download_image` - Download source image error - `error_decode_image` - Decode source image error - `unknown_internal_error` - Others |
| `data.error_message` | `string` | No | Detailed description of error |
| `data.results` | `TaskStatusResponseBodySingleUrlResultsV2` | No | — |
| `data.results.url` | `string` | No | URL to download this result. Valid for 2 hours |

**400** — Invalid task id

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `object`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `status` | `integer` | No | Response status |
| `error_code` | `string — InvalidTaskId` | No | — |

**401** — Invalid API Key or Inactive API Key or Expired API Key

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `object`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `status` | `integer` | No | Response status |
| `error_code` | `string — InvalidApiKey \| InactiveApiKey \| ExpiredApiKey` | No | — |

**500** — The task has no response in the expected time

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `object`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `status` | `integer` | No | Response status |
| `error_code` | `string — TaskTimeout` | No | — |

### `GET` `/s2s/v2.0/task/template/hair-bang`
**List predefined templates.**

**Tags:** V1.0

**Authentication:** BearerAuthenticationV2
#### Parameters

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `page_size` | query | `integer` | No | Number of results to return in this page. Valid value should be between 1 and 20. Default 20. |
| `starting_token` | query | `string` | No | Token for current page. Start with `null` for the first page, and use `next_token` from the previous response to start next page |

#### Responses

**200** — Successful retrieval of styles

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `TemplateResponseSchema`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `status` | `integer` | No | Response status |
| `data` | `object` | No | — |
| `data.templates` | `array<Template>` | No | — |
| `data.templates.id` | `string` | No | The ID of the template. Use this as `template_id` when run task. |
| `data.templates.thumb` | `string` | No | The thumbnail of style. |
| `data.templates.title` | `string` | No | The title of the template. |
| `data.templates.category_name` | `string` | No | The category name of the template. |
| `data.next_token` | `string` | No | Token to query next page. |

**400** — Invalid request parameters

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `object`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `status` | `integer` | No | Response status |
| `error` | `string` | No | Error message |
| `error_code` | `string — InvalidParameters` | No | — |

**401** — Invalid API Key or Inactive API Key or Expired API Key

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `object`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `status` | `integer` | No | Response status |
